_meta.source: eBay public sold listings (HTML scrape, LH_Sold=1)
_meta.note: SOLD comps scraped in batches of 10. No brand filter. Junk titles removed. Taguchi winsorized mean + market stability CV. Ungraded condition policy (permissive for sold). Currency normalized to USD via CBSA. Prices include shipping when parseable.

ungradedPolicy.note: Permissive for sold comps (unknown condition accepted)
